name: Rotork plc
description: Rotork plc is a British-based global leader in the design and manufacture of industrial flow control equipment. The company specializes in providing mission-critical flow control solutions, including actuators, gearboxes, and control systems, which are essential for the safe and efficient operation of infrastructure in the oil and gas, water and wastewater, power, and chemical process industries. Headquartered in Bath, United Kingdom, Rotork operates a worldwide network of manufacturing facilities and service centers, delivering innovative engineering solutions that help customers improve operational efficiency, reduce environmental impact, and ensure the reliability of their critical assets.
